The Real Issue

Most IT companies don't have
a sales problem. They have
a system problem.

01

Unpredictable revenue cycles

Feast-or-famine quarters, no pipeline visibility, decisions made on gut rather than data. Your team works hard — but results feel random.

02

Long, inconsistent deal cycles

Complex IT deals stall because there's no repeatable process. Every rep runs their own playbook, and onboarding new salespeople takes months — not weeks.

03

Reliance on hero salespeople

Revenue depends on one or two exceptional individuals. If they leave, the pipeline collapses. You need a clear sales approach that performs regardless of who's selling.

Meet the Founder

i built a business
not for wealth, but
for freedom — and
i want that for you.

After years deep in IT sales, I watched too many talented teams stuck in chaotic pipelines and inconsistent results. Terre de Chance exists to change that. We consult on AI-assisted sales strategy that brings clarity, predictability, and real freedom to founders and revenue leaders — so the business works for you, not the other way around.

Stach Miklashevich, CEO & Founder

What We Do

four offer pillars

01

Revenue Architecture

Design the full sales motion — from who you sell to, how you position, and how deals flow from first touch to close.

  • GTM strategy & market entry
  • ICP definition & offer structuring
  • Sales process engineering
  • Revenue model optimization
⬡ AI-Powered
02

Pipeline Growth

Build and run the outbound and inbound engine that fills the pipeline with qualified opportunities — consistently.

  • Outbound campaign design & execution
  • AI-assisted prospecting & sequencing
  • Funnel diagnostics & conversion fixes
  • Deal progression & acceleration
03

Sales Function Buildout

Stand up a sales department that can operate and scale without depending on one person — including when that person is you.

  • Sales department setup from zero
  • SDR / AE process & hiring advisory
  • Playbooks & sales enablement
  • Comp plans, KPIs & performance structure
04

Fractional Strategic Support

Embedded senior-level revenue leadership — without the cost or commitment of a full-time hire.

  • Fractional Head of Sales
  • Ongoing revenue advisory
  • Pipeline reviews & deal coaching
  • Strategic decision support

Engagement Models

how we work together

Strategy Sprint

Diagnose & Design

A focused 4–6 week engagement. We audit your pipeline, define the gaps, and deliver a concrete revenue architecture — with a clear execution roadmap.

Best for: founders who need clarity before committing to a full build.

Implementation

Build & Execute

3–6 month hands-on engagement. We design and run the full sales motion alongside your team — outbound, playbooks, hiring, pipeline management.

Best for: companies ready to build and willing to move fast.

Fractional Head of Sales

Lead & Operate

Ongoing embedded revenue leadership — weekly cadence, deal reviews, team coaching, and strategic oversight. Senior operator without the full-time overhead.

Best for: scaling teams that need senior leadership but aren't ready to hire VP-level.

Typical engagements run 3–6 months before meaningful traction. No 30-day miracle claims.

what actually happened

$5.5M ARR
in 24 months

IT Services Firm — Built from Zero

No pipeline, no process, no sales team. We designed the full GTM motion, ran outbound, and built the sales function from the ground up. Scaled to $5.5M in two years without a single enterprise head of sales.

30% shorter cycles
across the pipeline

SaaS Company — Deal Velocity Fix

Deals were stalling at proposal stage. We restructured qualification, tightened the sales process, and introduced AI-assisted follow-up. Average cycle length dropped by nearly a third within one quarter.

0 → $1M ARR
in under 14 months

Software Consultancy — First Revenue Engine

Founder-led sales, no repeatable motion, high dependency on referrals. We defined the ICP, launched outbound, and built the first real pipeline. Hit first $1M ARR before hiring a dedicated salesperson.
